# Getting support

Pick the right channel:

> **⚠ Security vulnerabilities:** Do not open a public issue. See the [Security Policy][SECURITY].

- **Questions, help requests, community chat** → [Discussions][discussions].
- **Bugs, feature requests, documentation feedback** → [Issues][issues-new].

Before filing, check:

- Existing [issues][issues] and [discussions][discussions].
- [README][README], [CONTRIBUTING][CONTRIBUTING], and [STYLEGUIDE][STYLEGUIDE].
- Community expectations: [Code of Conduct][CODE_OF_CONDUCT].

[CODE_OF_CONDUCT]: ../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
[CONTRIBUTING]: ../CONTRIBUTING.md
[README]: ../README.md
[SECURITY]: ../SECURITY.md
[STYLEGUIDE]: ../STYLEGUIDE.md
[discussions]: https://github.com/Jekwwer/python-workspace/discussions
[issues]: https://github.com/Jekwwer/python-workspace/issues?q=is%3Aissue
[issues-new]: https://github.com/Jekwwer/python-workspace/issues/new/choose
